calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-13-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-13-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings Not Reported.

Kaquishka Turner, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
Wendell Davis, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Bobby Hunter.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on December 28, 2017.
Defendant's answer was filed on January 11, 2018.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on January 29, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc., and against defendant Bobby Hunter, as follows:

Plaintiff is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the property located at 405 Valcencia Street, Room #217, San Francisco, CA 94103.

The rental agreement is canceled and the lease is forfeited.

Proposed Judgment for Possession Only was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2018 Off Calendar
